start:
All systems go! /ub
	This debug mission aims to execute all scripting commands currently available to Laputa!
	/progress_main_mission
textbox_demo:
/newchar,Cool,Aikka newchar sets a name and portrait to the dialog box.
	/face,Sasuke face changes or sets a portrait.
	/flipface,right flipface flips the portrait, here we flip it to the Right.
	/flipface,left Now we flip it to the Left.
	/name,Sasuke name changes the name on the dialog box. /name,Peter Like this.
	/hidename hidename removes it.
	/hideface hideface removes the portrait.
	/b b is for Bold text. /ub ub stops it.
	/impactline impact line.
	/auto,on When auto is set to 'on', text auto progresses.
	line
	You cannot press the any button to skip it.
	This is enabled by default in signs, however they print instantly.
	/auto,off auto is now set to 'off'.
	Topics, such as this /t,example example /ut format this text to a golden color! Check book in the Q menu.
	That's all for this category! /progress_main_mission
yes_no_demo:
/newchar,Juniper,Juniper
	/yn should i own an air fryer?..
	/db,0 yes, the masses must know air fry. /eb
	/db,1 no, but what if... /udb
	/m delightfully devilish, juniper
options_demo:
/newchar,Basil,Basil
	/options,a,b,c,d Pick the correct one.
	/db,0 Nope! /udb
	/db,1 Incorrect. /udb
	/db,2 Right answer! /eb /progress_main_mission
	/db,4 Cmon, at least try to get it right... /udb
	/m EXTREMELY LOUD BUZZER SOUND /progress_main_mission
entity_demo:
/newchar,Sage,Sage Lets make Basil vanish forever.
	/hide,basil Poof, he's gone forever.
	/unhide,basil Okay you can have him back.
	/knockpc,left now get outta ere!
	/left,aikka hmph!
	/right,aikka
	/progress_main_mission
camera_demo:
/lookat,sage,basil lookat can target one or more NPCs
	/cam,to_waypoint,0,30 move the camera to a global waypoint of index 0, set on the map
	/cam,wait,1 here we are waiting for 1 seconds before running the next command
	/cam,to_player,30 returning the camera to the player.
	/cam,to_pos,100,100,30 here we are moving the camera to the position x100, y100 at speed 30
	/cam,hold camera will be held at this position until the player progresses text
	/cam,to_player,30 returning the camera to the player once more
